name: My law firm's website isn't showing up in ChatGPT answers anymore, what do I do right now?
description: Add LegalService/Attorney schema and FAQ content now; test in ChatGPT for visibility.[1]

mainEntity.name: My law firm's website isn't showing up in ChatGPT answers anymore, what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Add LegalService/Attorney schema and FAQ content now; test in ChatGPT for visibility.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Update your schema markup and add FAQ sections immediately.** AI search relies on structured data like LegalService and Attorney/Person schema with sameAs links to bar profiles, plus scannable Q&A content.[1][2] Fresh, authoritative content citing statutes boosts visibility within weeks.[1]

**Key Factors:**
- Missing schema prevents AI from understanding your expertise.
- Lack of E-E-A-T signals (experience, citations to gov sources) drops rankings.[1]
- No topic clusters weakens authority.

**Practical Guidance:** Run a free schema validator tool, add Person schema to bios, and publish 3-5 question-based pages on core practice areas today. Test by querying AI tools directly.

Track changes with AI visibility audits for quick wins.
